description_long: This object is a wristwatch with a round face and a segmented metal link bracelet. The watch case is circular and appears to be made of a metallic material, with a smooth bezel and a plain, undecorated dial. The bracelet consists of interlocking rectangular links, giving it a classic and robust appearance. The watch face is minimalistic, lacking visible markers, numerals, or hands, and the surface is flat and untextured. The clasp mechanism is not visible, but the bracelet design suggests a standard metal clasp. The overall design is simple and functional, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A round-faced wristwatch with a segmented metal link bracelet and a plain, undecorated dial. The design is minimalistic and classic, with no visible markers or hands.
description_view_0: The watch is seen at an angle, highlighting the round face and the gold-colored segmented bracelet.
description_view_1: A side profile shows the thinness of the watch case and the flatness of the bracelet links.
description_view_2: The watch is viewed from the opposite angle, emphasizing the face and the length of the bracelet.
description_view_3: A top-down view displays the full length of the bracelet and the circular watch face.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is plain and featureless, with no visible markers, numerals, subdials, or decorative elements. The style is minimalist.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet, constructed from interlocking rectangular segments, likely stainless steel or gold-plated metal.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display type, but no hands or markers are visible on the face. The display is blank and minimalist.
